name: wtr-lab-term-inconsistency-finder
description: Finds term inconsistencies in WTR Lab chapters using Gemini and OpenAI-compatible AI providers. Supports multiple API keys with smart rotation, dynamic model fetching, and background processing.
author: MasuRii

scripts.build: npm run version:update && node --import tsx ./node_modules/webpack/bin/webpack.js --config webpack.config.ts --mode=production
scripts.build:performance: npm run version:update && node --import tsx ./node_modules/webpack/bin/webpack.js --config webpack.config.ts --mode=production
scripts.build:greasyfork: npm run version:update && node --import tsx ./node_modules/webpack/bin/webpack.js --config webpack.config.ts --mode=production
scripts.build:devbundle: npm run version:update && node --import tsx ./node_modules/webpack/bin/webpack.js --config webpack.config.ts --mode=development
